goals: Store explicit preference about trail information format
Search for previously stored trail preferences and hiking patterns
Review all stored memories to see what has been remembered
Remove an outdated or incorrect memory about trails

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and methodical. Enjoys learning about new trails and parks, appreciates organized information about outdoor conditions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about hiking trails in Boone and prefers detailed trail information. Does not know about mem0 or any memory management tools - treats this as a conversation with an assistant that can learn preferences.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored a trail preference, searched for relevant memories, reviewed what is stored, and removed one outdated memory about trails.
